title: Issue 3 init/audit artifact hygiene
description: Resolve roadmap-sliced-development init/audit/docs UX gaps from GitHub issue #3.

1-1.label: Pattern id 入口兼容与短名公开化

decisions.q: roadmap-sliced-development 的公开入口如何处理？
decisions.answer: 直接把 roadmap-sliced-development 作为用户可控的公开推荐入口；保留 roadmap-sliced-development-pattern 作为兼容 alias，避免已发布 0.1.1 用户断裂。
decisions.note: 用户确认：用户可控，直接修改。

1-1.notes: Implemented canonical pattern id roadmap-sliced-development in registry/docs/bundled registries. Kept legacy roadmap-sliced-development-pattern accepted in zj-loop-init and zj-loop-cost CLI entrypoints. Verification: npm run validate:registry; npm run test:zj-loop-core; npm run test:zj-loop-init; npm run test:zj-loop-cost.

1-2.label: zj namespaced init artifacts 契约

decisions.q: namespaced artifacts 的迁移范围是什么？
decisions.answer: roadmap-sliced-development 继续改；同时所有 pattern 的 ZJ-LOOP.md / zj-loop-budget.md / zj-loop-run-log.md 统一迁移到 ZJ-ZJ-LOOP.md / zj-loop-budget.md / zj-loop-run-log.md。
decisions.note: 用户确认：所有 pattern 统一迁移。

decisions.q: 上一条 namespaced artifact 决策中的 ZJ-ZJ-LOOP.md 如何理解？
decisions.answer: 这是机械替换 typo，正确目标是 ZJ-LOOP.md / zj-loop-budget.md / zj-loop-run-log.md；不引入 ZJ-ZJ-LOOP.md。
decisions.note: 过程纠错，保留决策历史。

1-2.notes: Migrated loop config and cost artifacts to ZJ-LOOP.md, zj-loop-budget.md, zj-loop-run-log.md, plus zj-loop-budget/zj-loop-constraints skill namespaces. Added ci-sweeper ZJ-LOOP.md so every registered starter now has a loop config. Read paths prefer new names and retain compatibility for old LOOP.md/loop-* files in audit and MCP. Verification: npm run test:zj-loop-core; npm run test:zj-loop-init; npm run test:zj-loop-audit; npm run test:zj-loop-mcp-server; npm run test:zj-loop-sync; npm run test:zj-loop-cost; npm run validate:registry; npm run check:zj-loop-init; git diff --check.

1-3.label: audit 识别 init state 与 artifact contract

decisions.answer: 要，但先只用于 zj-loop-init / zj-loop-audit 内部契约，不急着暴露成用户文档主概念。
decisions.note: 用户确认：内部使用，不作为用户主概念。

1-3.notes: Added package-internal artifact contracts for zj-loop-init and zj-loop-audit. Init now derives config/budget/run-log/constraints paths and zj-loop skill namespaces from the contract. Audit now uses the contract to recognize ZJ-LOOP.md with legacy LOOP.md fallback, zj-loop-budget/zj-loop-run-log with legacy loop-* fallback, zj-loop constraints/skills, and roadmap-sliced-state.md generated by init. Verification: npm run test:zj-loop-init; npm run test:zj-loop-audit.

1-4.label: audit suggestions 防覆盖与精确诊断
1-4.notes: Replaced static --suggest copy block with context-aware suggestions derived from AuditResult signals and artifact contract. Missing files get copy/scaffold actions; existing files with incomplete policy get targeted edit guidance, e.g. add Budget section to ZJ-LOOP.md. Added regression test ensuring existing zj-loop-budget.md and zj-loop-run-log.md are not suggested for copy. Verification: npm run test:zj-loop-audit; git diff --check.

1-5.label: readiness score 与 hard gate 解释
1-5.notes: Reporter now explains readiness level gates separately from numeric score in human and markdown output. High score with L0/L1/L2 now surfaces hard gate reasons such as missing state, missing triage, incomplete cost observability, missing verifier, or no proven loop activity. Updated --suggest tip text. Verification: npm run test:zj-loop-audit; git diff --check.

1-6.label: offline cached CLI 使用路径文档
1-6.notes: Documented fallback CLI paths for npx stalls/offline use. Quickstart now covers installed binaries, npm exec --offline cache reuse, official registry override, and from-source deterministic commands. README/README.zh-CN link to the fallback section; init/audit/cost package READMEs include package-specific offline/cache commands. Verification: rg fallback text across docs; git diff --check.

1-7.label: 验证发布影响与 issue closeout
1-7.notes: Release-impact verification passed. Evidence: npm run validate:registry; npm run test:zj-loop-core; npm run test:zj-loop-init; npm run test:zj-loop-audit; npm run test:zj-loop-cost; npm run test:zj-loop-mcp-server; npm run test:zj-loop-sync; npm run check:zj-loop-init; npm run test:release-workflows; git diff --check. GitHub issue closeout is intentionally not performed in this node without explicit user instruction; local closeout evidence is recorded here.

1-8.label: 过程设计文档合并与删除 closeout
1-8.notes: Merged process design content into durable docs: runtime continuous execution, stop conditions, roadmap write safety, expected-red behavior, active focus depth warning, and Human Gate taxonomy now live in patterns/roadmap-sliced-development-pattern.md, docs/safety.md, and docs/loop-design-checklist.md. Removed stale design-record link from starters/roadmap-sliced-development-pattern/ZJ-LOOP.md. Deleted process docs docs/designs/roadmap-sliced-development-pattern.md and docs/designs/zagenticloop-runtime-constraints.md. Verification: rg found no stale references to deleted docs; npm run validate:registry; git diff --check; roadmap_cli validate.

1-9.label: 用户项目投放文件收敛到 zj 前缀目录

decisions.q: 用户项目投放文件收敛到哪个 zj 前缀目录？
decisions.answer: 采用 zj-loop/ 作为新主目录：zj-loop/ZJ-LOOP.md、zj-loop/STATE.md 或 zj-loop/<pattern>-state.md、zj-loop/zj-loop-budget.md、zj-loop/zj-loop-run-log.md、zj-loop/zj-loop-constraints.md。工具宿主要求的 .codex/.grok/.claude skill/agent 目录不强行移动；audit/MCP/sync 优先读取 zj-loop/，旧根路径仅作为兼容候选。

1-9.notes: Implemented zj-loop/ as the primary user-project artifact directory. zj-loop-init now writes state, ZJ-LOOP.md, budget, run log, and constraints under zj-loop/. zj-loop-audit, zj-loop-core evidence, zj-loop-mcp-server resources, and zj-loop-sync now prefer zj-loop/ paths while retaining root legacy candidates for current users. Updated targeted quickstart/package/starter docs and tests. Verification: npm run test:zj-loop-core; npm run test:zj-loop-init; npm run test:zj-loop-audit; npm run test:zj-loop-mcp-server; npm run test:zj-loop-sync; npm run validate:registry; npm run check:zj-loop-init; git diff --check.

1-10.label: 全仓库 roadmap 对齐查漏补缺
1-10.notes: 完成全仓库 roadmap 对齐查漏补缺：统一 canonical pattern/starter 为 roadmap-sliced-development；dogfood live artifacts 移入 zj-loop/；去除 init/cost 的旧 pattern alias 和 source-level 根目录 artifact fallback；registry state paths/schema、audit/core/MCP/sync/init/cost 契约统一到 zj-loop/STATE.md、zj-loop/ZJ-LOOP.md、zj-loop/zj-loop-budget.md、zj-loop/zj-loop-run-log.md、zj-loop/zj-loop-constraints.md；修正 starter/examples/docs/scripts 中根目录复制示例、旧 @cobusgreyling/loop-* 引用、坏替换字符串和 audit demo script 路径。保留仅用于拒绝旧 id 的负向测试。验证：npm run test:zj-loop-core；npm run test:zj-loop-audit；npm run test:zj-loop-cost；npm run test:zj-loop-sync；npm run test:zj-loop-mcp-server；npm run test:zj-loop-init；npm run validate:registry；npm run check:zj-loop-init；git diff --check；精准旧引用扫描仅剩 roadmap-sliced-development-pattern 的负向拒绝测试。
